result.summary: BILL exposes documented HTTP APIs for v3 AP/AR, Spend & Expense, partner operations, and legacy v2 AP/AR; all require BILL-issued credentials, and no first-party GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surface was found on bill.com.
result.description: BILL provides software for automating business payments, receivables, spend management, and related financial workflows. Its platform supports accounts payable, accounts receivable, virtual cards, reimbursements, and partner-managed organization operations.

developer_key.label: BILL developer key
developer_key.setup: Create a BILL developer account via the [sandbox sign-up guide](https://developer.bill.com/v2/docs/sign-up-process) or [production sign-up form](https://www.bill.com/signup). In the BILL web app, generate a developer key as an `ADMINISTRATOR`; the guide notes you can generate developer keys in the web app and use them with your test organizations and users.

bill_user_login.label: BILL user login
bill_user_login.setup: Create a BILL developer account following the [sandbox sign-up guide](https://developer.bill.com/v2/docs/sign-up-process). Your sign-up creates the username (email), password, and organization ID required for API login. Complete the web signup and 2-step verification, then use the resulting account credentials for API sign-in.

apar_sync_token.label: BILL AP/AR sync token
apar_sync_token.setup: Sign in to the [BILL sandbox web app](https://app-stage02.us.bill.com/neo/login), then go to `Settings` → `Sync & Integrations` → `Tokens`, click `NEW`, set a token name, and save. The token name becomes the API login `userName` and the generated token value becomes the API login `password` for sync-token sign-in.

console_api_token.label: BILL Accountant Console API token
console_api_token.setup: Generate a Console API token following the Accountant Console operations flow referenced from [BILL keys & tokens](https://developer.bill.com/docs/bill-keys-tokens.md). BILL documents that this token is used with `POST /v3/login` together with your BILL username, organization ID, and developer key to access client organizations for AP and AR operations.

se_api_token.label: BILL Spend & Expense API token
se_api_token.setup: For sandbox, submit the [Sandbox Access Form](https://app-dev-bdc-stg.divvy.co/create-sandbox-company) described in [Authentication with Spend & Expense API token](https://developer.bill.com/docs/authentication-with-api-token.md); BILL provides an `apiToken` for the test company. For production, follow [Generate an API token in BILL Spend & Expense](https://help.bill.com/direct/s/article/6633616). BILL notes only `ADMIN` users can generate production Spend & Expense API tokens.
